Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present. Represented by.
Attorney Saul Fester for the plaintiff.
Defendant Corbin Sedalia is present.
Attorney Linda Galbreath appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ray Erlach, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-06-2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
